# SmoothSend

> SmoothSend is a gasless transaction infrastructure platform for Aptos. It lets dApp developers sponsor gas fees for their users â€” users sign transactions normally but never pay gas. Live on Aptos Mainnet.

Full documentation (all pages, single file): https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/llms-full.txt

## Key Facts

- 3-line integration using the `@smoothsend/sdk` npm package
- Works as a drop-in `transactionSubmitter` for `@aptos-labs/wallet-adapter-react`
- Testnet is always free. Mainnet fee is $0.01 minimum per transaction.
- Secure by default: API key auth, rate limiting, gateway-level validation on every request
- Multi-chain roadmap: Aptos live now, EVM and Stellar coming soon
- MCP server available: `@smoothsend/mcp` on npm â€” gives AI assistants (Cursor, Claude Desktop, Windsurf) full SDK context

## Documentation

- [Home](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz): Overview, quick start code, and pricing calculator
- [Installation](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/aptos/installation): How to install `@smoothsend/sdk` and set up the SDK
- [Quick Start](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/aptos/quickstart): Step-by-step guide to go gasless in minutes
- [API Reference](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/aptos/api-reference): Full API reference for SmoothSendTransactionSubmitter and ScriptComposerClient
- [Sponsorship Rules](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/aptos/sponsorship-rules): Configure which wallets, functions, and transaction types are sponsored
- [Examples](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/aptos/examples): Real-world code examples for wallet adapter setup, USDC transfers, fee previews, and error handling
- [Pricing](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/billing): Credit-based pricing details and interactive gas calculator
- [MCP Server](https://docs.smoothsend.xyz/mcp): MCP server for AI assistants (Cursor, Claude Desktop, Windsurf) â€” install `@smoothsend/mcp` from npm
- [Dashboard](https://dashboard.smoothsend.xyz): Manage API keys, top up credits, monitor usage

## Integration Summary

Install the SDK:

```bash
npm install @smoothsend/sdk
```

Wrap your app with the gasless submitter (`providers.tsx`):

```ts
import { SmoothSendTransactionSubmitter } from '@smoothsend/sdk';
import { AptosWalletAdapterProvider } from '@aptos-labs/wallet-adapter-react';

const smoothSend = new SmoothSendTransactionSubmitter({
  apiKey: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SMOOTHSEND_API_KEY!,
  network: 'mainnet', // or 'testnet' (always free)
});

export function Providers({ children }) {
  return (
    <AptosWalletAdapterProvider
      dappConfig={{ network: Network.MAINNET, transactionSubmitter: smoothSend }}
    >
      {children}
    </AptosWalletAdapterProvider>
  );
}
```

After this, every `signAndSubmitTransaction` call in your app is automatically gasless â€” no other code changes needed.

## Two Integration Methods

### Method 1 â€” Wallet Adapter (Recommended)

Pass `SmoothSendTransactionSubmitter` as the `transactionSubmitter` to `AptosWalletAdapterProvider`. Works for any transaction type: APT transfers, token transfers, contract calls, NFT mints, DeFi. Mainnet usage deducts credits from your dashboard balance ($0.01 minimum per transaction).

### Method 2 â€” Script Composer (Fee-in-Token)

Use `ScriptComposerClient` for stablecoin transfers (USDC, USDT, WBTC, USDe, USD1) where the relayer fee (~$0.01) is deducted directly from the token being sent. No APT or SmoothSend credits required. Supports fee estimation before signing via `client.estimateFee()`.

```ts
import { ScriptComposerClient } from '@smoothsend/sdk';

const client = new ScriptComposerClient({
  apiKey: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SMOOTHSEND_API_KEY!,
  network: 'mainnet',
});

// Build â†’ sign â†’ submit
const build = await client.buildTransfer({
  sender: walletAddress,
  recipient: '0xRecipientAddress',
  amount: '1000000', // 1 USDC (6 decimals)
  assetType: '0xbae207659db88bea0cbead6da0ed00aac12edcdda169e591cd41c94180b46f3b',
  decimals: 6,
  symbol: 'USDC',
});
```

## Supported Tokens (Script Composer, Mainnet)

| Symbol | Decimals | Aptos Mainnet Asset Address |
|--------|----------|------------------------------|
| USDC   | 6        | `0xbae207659db88bea0cbead6da0ed00aac12edcdda169e591cd41c94180b46f3b` |
| USDT   | 6        | `0x357b0b74bc833e95a115ad22604854d6b0fca151cecd94111770e5d6ffc9dc2b` |
| WBTC   | 8        | `0x68c2185f5e2023f2e4401ba56b66c8ae2cfcf8a27852e70eb78b03f59a652a3d` |
| USDe   | 6        | `0xf37a4a75f89b79985c1fcb42d0a87f4bde28cc2b46c4dd01d9a8428e7726e2e9` |
| USD1   | 6        | `0x05fa02d0fa44a90ad59fb90adb08e24c4efbc98eb9e9f2d0d9c0ad18d7fc9d2` |

## Error Codes

- `401` â€” Invalid API key
- `402` â€” Insufficient credits; top up at dashboard.smoothsend.xyz
- `429` â€” Rate limit exceeded

## Pricing

- Testnet: Always free, no credits required
- Mainnet (Wallet Adapter): Credits deducted from dashboard balance, $0.01 minimum per transaction
- Mainnet (Script Composer): Fee deducted from the token being sent, no credits needed
- Users pay $0 gas â€” the dApp's credits or token fee covers it

## Support

- Email: contact@smoothsend.xyz
- Twitter: https://x.com/smoothsend
- GitHub: https://github.com/smoothsend
